titleStmt.title: SII 4.1113: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1113. (A.R. No. 257 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Asti śrīvelanā[(ṁ)ṇṭi]goṁkkanṛpati
trikaliṁgakuṁtalapatīnnirjjitya yassaṁyugē svādhīnāmmahatīmmahīmanubhavassāṁbrājyacihnaiḥ sthitaḥ [. 1*] yasyāśāvijaya
prayāṇajanitaṁ rāvaṁ samākarṇnya yaṁ bhītāḥ kāṁccanakarṇnakuṇḍalamaṇīnādāya paśyaṁtyalaṁ . kāliṁgā magadhāśca kuṁttala
nṛpāstadbhaktiyuktāḥ prabhuṁdṛpyadvairimadēbhasiṁhamacalaṁ rājēṁdracōḍaṁ raṇē [. 2*] rakṣārtthaṁ bhuvanasya janmani harērllakṣmīḥ prajā
tā svayaṁ nityaṁ sarvvaguṇāspadēti vibudhaissaṁkkīrttyamānāniśaṁ . śrīmaccōḍamahīpatē(ḥ)rbbudhanidhēścittānusaṁraṁjinī tasyābhūnmahiṣī
tapōbhiratulaiḥ paṇḍāṁbikā bhūtalē [. 3*] Āsīdvēṁgīṁdranāmā sakalajananutaḥ kōnakaṇḍrāḍimukhyastasmādbhūkalpavṛkṣassurapatisadṛśō vīrarājaḥ
prajātaḥ . tasmātsadvaṁśajātātpaśupatinṛpatiryyatpriyā pōtamāṁbā tābhyāṁ rājēṁdracōḍakṣitipatimahiṣī paṇḍamāṁbājaniṣṭa [. 4*]
śākābdēśaranāgabhēṁdhugaṇitē puṇyē suyāmyāyanē sēyaṁ cōḍamahīpatēḥ priyatamā paṇḍāṁbikābhūravi .dākṣārāmanivāsinē bhagavatē bhīmēśvarāyā
diśaddīpaṁ dīpramakhaṇḍamujvalaśikhaṁ dharmmārtthamudyanmatiḥ [. 5*] śakavarṣa 1085 nēṁṭi śrīrājarājasaṁvatsara 18 śrāhi dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna velanāṇṭi śrīmanmahā
maṇḍalēśvara kulōttuṁgacōḍagoṁkkarājula koḍku śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara rājēṁdracōḍayarājula Arddhāṁgalakṣmīyaina śrīmatupaṇḍamadēvulu śrībhīmēśvaramāhādēvaraku
beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇḍu diviya 1 ṇṭiki bōlu naluvuruṁ būṇṭugā bādabōla vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki nityapaḍi Ācaṁ
drārkkamu kolavaṁggala tribhuvanāṁkkuśa nē māna 1 likhitaṁ peddanācā
Digital edition of SII 4.1113 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
